title: Mumbai, Maharashtra — Cost of Living, Housing & Relocation Guide [2026]
description: Complete guide to Mumbai, Maharashtra: cost of living, home prices, neighborhoods, remote work readiness, and relocation tips.
content:
Overview

Mumbai is a city in Maharashtra with a population of 20,961,000. India’s financial capital and largest city, home to Bollywood, the Bombay Stock Exchange, and a vibrant coastal urban culture.

Last updated: July 20, 2026
